title: spiranthes australis
intro: Spiranthes australis, also known as the Australian lady's tresses, is a type of orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Spiranthes australis include reducing inflammation, alleviating coughs, and improving breathing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
